Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce a solution that constructs an accepting Petri net for a complex insurance claim management process scenario We have described a process Customer files Insurance Claim C then following steps

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Additionally there are two loops If documents incomplete after Document Verification DV re submission of documents RDS step occurs before process continues Similarly if Fraud Check FC raises doubts an additional In depth Investigation II is performed This can happen multiple times before proceeding to Claim Assessment CA

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to define a Petri net with places representing states between these activities We are told that places represent states but actually we have transitions for each activity

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I propose the following design Lets define places for each step Place names p_start p_after_CR p_dv p_rds p_fc p_ii p_ca p_ap p_p p_n p_cl

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Transitions T_CR Claim Registration T_DV Document Verification T_RDS Re Document Submission T_FC Fraud Check T_II In depth Investigation T_CA Claim Assessment T_AP Approval T_P Payment T_N Notification T_CL Closure

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Start p_start to T_CR to p_after_CR Then from p_after_CR go to T_DV to p_dv

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The text says if documents are incomplete after Document Verification DV a re submission of documents step occurs before the process continues So the flow DV to possibly RDS And then from RDS presumably back to DV or directly to FC But typically in such processes the loop would be if RDS triggered then after re submitting go back to document verification

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can have p_dv to T_RDS to p_rds and then from p_rds to T_DV back to p_dv

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If documents are complete maybe T_DV leads directly to FC So add an arc from p_dv to T_FC for the correct branch

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the fraud check loop after T_FC maybe if doubts arise we do an in depth investigation II So similar structure p_fc to T_II leading to p_ii and then from p_ii to T_FC returning token to p_fc

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After p_fc add an arc for the good branch p_fc to T_CA leading to p_ca

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After claim assessment we have p_ca to T_AP leads to p_ap Then p_ap to T_P leads to p_p Then p_p to T_N leads to p_n Finally p_n to T_CL leads to p_cl

Name: Validation - PE
Text: That final marking is fm with token in p_cl And the initial marking im should be placed in start state

Name: Validation - IND
Text: I will define marking im and fm im Marking with token in start im p_start equals 1 fm Marking with token in closure fm p_cl equals 1
